headings: Section 12. Applications for Payment, Releases, Lien-Free Project
text: Section 26. Project Close-Out. The Subcontractor shall furnish all guaranties, bonds, training, operations and maintenance  manuals,  operating  instructions,  etc.,  as  required  by  the  Contract  Documents  with  respect  to  the Subcontract Work as a condition precedent to Final Payment. Within thirty (30) days of Substantial Completion or such lesser time as may be required by the Contract Documents, Subcontractor shall fully complete all punch list work, to Owner's and Contractor's satisfaction, and such completion shall also be a condition precedent to Final Payment.
